texto: Life can be less mysterious than we make it out to be when we try to think about how it would be on other planets. And if we remove the mystery of life, then I think it is a little bit easier for us to think about how we live, and how perhaps we're not as special as we always think we are.
explicacao: Citação de Chris Adami sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life can be less mysterious than we make it out to be when we try to think about how it would be …” articula reflexao, vida, live em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como live e mystery.

And if we remove the mystery of life, then I think it is a little bit easier for us to think about how we live, and how perhaps we're not as special as we always think we are.
